problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
